recommendations.title: A Boy and His Dog
recommendations.overview: Set in the year 2024 in post-apocalyptic America, 18-year old Vic and his telepathic dog, Blood, are scavengers in the desolate wilderness ravaged by World War IV, where survivors must battle for food and shelter in the desert-like wasteland. Vic and

recommendations.title: The Garfield Movie
recommendations.overview: Garfield, the world-famous, Monday-hating, lasagna-loving indoor cat, is about to have a wild outdoor adventure! After an unexpected reunion with his long-lost father – scruffy street cat Vic – Garfield and his canine friend Odie are forced from thei

recommendations.title: Piper
recommendations.overview: A mother bird tries to teach her little one how to find food by herself. In the process, she encounters a traumatic experience that she must overcome in order to survive.

recommendations.title: Get Duked!
recommendations.overview: An anarchic, hip-hop inspired comedy that follows four city boys on a wilderness trek as they try to escape a mysterious huntsman.

recommendations.title: Charm School
recommendations.overview: Defiant 18-year-old Adela León pushes her father and an unbending headmistress to the limit in this delicious comedy.

recommendations.title: Hunger
recommendations.overview: A talented young street-food cook pushes herself to the limit after accepting an invitation to train under an infamous and ruthless chef.

recommendations.title: Stand by Me

recommendations.title: Benji the Hunted
recommendations.overview: Benji has become stranded on a remote island after a boating accident. He finds himself struggling to survive in the wilderness, avoiding close encounters with a wolf, a bear, and a territorial female cougar with her cub.
